headline: Hung assembly in Tamil Nadu as Vijay’s TVK outpaces DMK and AIADMK
description: Tamil cinema star C. Joseph Vijay’s Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam (TVK) has made a stunning electoral debut by emerging as the single largest party in the 2026 Tamil Nadu Assembly elections. The results have ended decades of DMK‑AIADMK dominance and produced a hung Assembly, signalling a major shift in voter sentiment across the State.
